project: Healthcare Lead Generation MMM with PyMC-Marketing
note: Dataset is synthetic, built for portfolio demonstration and method testing. It intentionally includes seasonality, correlated channels, carryover, diminishing returns, capacity constraints, competitive pressure and call-tracking quality issues.
reference_model: Stabilized transformed regression with posterior-style uncertainty for output generation; PyMC-Marketing implementation template is included in src/pymc_marketing_reference.py.
